# CSOAI LTD

> CSOAI LTD is the UK-registered company (Companies House 16939677) that owns and operates MEOK AI Labs. This domain exists only to surface the legal-entity disclosure. All products, documentation, and purchases live at meok.ai.

## Legal entity
- Legal name: CSOAI LTD
- Trading name: MEOK AI Labs
- Company number: 16939677
- Jurisdiction: England & Wales
- Director: Nicholas Templeman
- Contact: hello@meok.ai

## Where the actual content lives
- Products & docs: https://meok.ai
- GitHub organisation: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG
- Companies House record: https://find-and-update.company-information.service.gov.uk/company/16939677
